state.next-action: Phase `18` is still in progress on `18-06`. Task `18-05` is complete: the shared-section editor and page-composer publish surface now load native Payload version history, restore selected versions back into draft state, and keep their history lists in sync after save, publish, clone, and restore actions without adding approvals, scheduling, or diff tooling. Focus next on `18-06`: extend verification beyond the new restore route/UI coverage into the broader shared-section authoring matrix, especially propagation, detach/replace behavior, constrained layout rules, and focused browser coverage. Note: targeted lint plus the new restore-flow Vitest suite are green, but full `tsc --noEmit` remains blocked by pre-existing unrelated errors in `src/app/api/internal/ai/copilot/route.ts`, `src/blocks/PricingTable/Component.tsx`, `src/components/copilot/PortalCopilot.tsx`, `src/components/nav-user.tsx`, and `tests/int/components/copilot/portal-copilot-runtime-provider.int.spec.tsx`.
